scripts.fable:build: export NUGET_PACKAGES=${NUGET_PACKAGES:-$PWD/.nuget/packages}; dotnet restore Firegrid.Fable.slnx ${NUGET_CONFIG:+--configfile "$NUGET_CONFIG"} -v:q && dotnet build Firegrid.Fable.slnx --no-restore -v:q && pnpm --dir src/Firegrid.Log build && pnpm --dir src/Firegrid.Store build
